amendments.normalized_body: Remove the two `eprintln!` debug-logging blocks added in `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` (lines ~69-75 and ~89-95 in the diff). These unconditionally dump stdout/stderr content and result payloads to stderr on every parse failure. They are unrelated to the artifact-metadata fix and appear to be leftover debugging scaffolding. If parse-failure diagnostics are needed, they should use the project's structured logging (tracing) rather than raw eprintln.

Remove the unconditional `--debug-file` argument addition in `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` (lines ~429-445 in the diff) that writes a debug log for every Claude invocation to `runtime/temp/{invocation_id}.claude-debug.log`. This is unrelated to the artifact-metadata fix and would generate debug files for every invocation in production.
Exclude the `result` symlink change from the branch. The diff shows the Nix store path in the `result` symlink changing — this is a local build artifact that should not be version-controlled.

Persist the requested invocation metadata on artifact records instead of only enriching `producer`: add a serde-defaulted `invocation_metadata` field with `backend_family` and `model_id`, thread `InvocationEnvelope.metadata.backend_used.family` and `InvocationEnvelope.metadata.model_used.model_id` through the artifact persistence helpers, and let `FsPayloadArtifactWriteStore` serialize it into `history/artifacts/*.json`.

Replace or extend the regression coverage so it asserts `invocation_metadata.backend_family` and `invocation_metadata.model_id` on a persisted artifact produced by the stage artifact path, rather than asserting only `producer.backend_family` / `producer.model_id` on final-review panel artifacts.

These unconditionally dump stdout/stderr content and result payloads to stderr on every parse failure. They are unrelated to the artifact-metadata fix and appear to be leftover debugging scaffolding. If parse-failure diagnostics are needed, they should use the project's structured logging (tracing) rather than raw eprintln.

Remove the unconditional `--debug-file` argument addition in `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` (lines ~429-445 in the diff) that writes a debug log for every Claude invocation to `runtime/temp/{invocation_id}.claude-debug.log`. This is unrelated to the artifact-metadata fix and would generate debug files for every invocation in production.
Exclude the `result` symlink change from the branch. The diff shows the Nix store path in the `result` symlink changing — this is a local build artifact that should not be version-controlled.

payload.summary: Final review accepted 3 amendment(s); restart required.
